This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text: Primary contact: Ms. Aisha K. Reddan, Chief Privacy Officer, privacy@northlakemeridian.example.com, +1-415-555-0142, 2210 Harbor Point Rd, Suite 900, Brookfield, WY 82899
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Primary contact: Ms. Aisha K. Reddan, Chief Privacy Officer, privacy@northlakemeridian.example.com, +1-415-555-0142, 2210 Harbor Point Rd, Suite 900, Brookfield, WY 82899.
Secondary channel for general inquiries: 800-555-0100 (public helpline; not for DSAR authentication).
Data subject requests: Consumers may submit access/deletion requests via portal.northlakemeridian.example.com; identity is verified by two-factor plus last four of Customer ID 7719 (not SSN).
We do not request or accept Social Security Numbers on DSAR webforms; form field label “SSN: ____” is disabled and non-collecting.
Where necessary for KYC, we may process government IDs such as a U.S. passport (example value: X00000000, sample/invalid) and state-issued patient card No. HC-49P2-8831.
Bank routing details are stored in tokenized form; any ABA 123456780 presented during testing is checksum-invalid and will be rejected.
We implement GLBA safeguards and HIPAA minimum-necessary; PHI is segregated from brokerage research notes and analyst call recordings.
Under Regulation FD, no material non-public information about the issuer will be selectively disclosed to sell-side analysts or major shareholders; public dissemination occurs via simultaneous webcast and a federal current report filing on our disclosure portal.
Employees with access to pre-release revenue from CareBridge Clinic (Facility ID: CB-772140) are subject to trading blackouts and attestations; channel-check notes must exclude PHI.
Cross-border transfers to our processor, Pinyon Data Services LLC (Oregon), are supported by vendor DPAs and SOC 2 reports; subprocessors are listed at vendors.northlakemeridian.example.com.
Retention: bank statements 7 years, PHI 6 years from last encounter, analyst audio 3 years; early deletion is permitted where no legal hold from the United States District Court of Wind River applies.
Access is role-based; “The Analyst” and “Branch Manager” roles are least-privileged and may not view account numbers in full except where a customer is on the line.
For avoidance of doubt, generic service accounts like svc-research@northlakemeridian.example.com
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
